name: openteam
description: Build your AI agent team in minutes — powered by Claude Code, Codex, and any CLI you plug in.

scripts.preview: npm run stop:daemon --silent && npm run build:ui && PORT=14000 tsx cli/bin/openteam.ts serve
scripts.dev:server: unset ELECTRON; OPENTEAM_NO_PORTFILE=1 tsx watch server/index.ts
scripts.dev:cli: npm run stop:daemon --silent; LOG_LEVEL=debug tsx cli/bin/openteam.ts
scripts.build:electron:main: esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/electron/main.js --external:electron --external:ws --external:fsevents --format=esm && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/electron/preload.cjs --external:electron --format=cjs && esbuild electron/notch-preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/electron/notch-preload.cjs --external:electron --format=cjs
scripts.build:server: esbuild server/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/server/index.js --format=esm --external:electron --external:better-sqlite3 --external:node-pty --external:ws --external:fsevents --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:notch-addon: cd electron/native && npx node-gyp rebuild --runtime=electron --target=$(npx electron --version | tr -d 'v') --arch=$(node -p "process.arch") --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron:main && concurrently "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:electron:server" "wait-on http://localhost:13000 http://localhost:13001/api/agents && electron ."
scripts.rebuild:native: npx node-gyp rebuild --directory=node_modules/node-pty && npx node-gyp rebuild --directory=node_modules/better-sqlite3
scripts.build:electron: npm run build:ui && npm run build:electron:main && npm run build:electron:server && electron-rebuild -f -w node-pty,better-sqlite3 && electron-builder && npm run rebuild:native
scripts.build:cli: esbuild cli/bin/openteam.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/cli/openteam.mjs --format=esm --external:better-sqlite3 --external:node-pty --external:ws --external:electron --external:fsevents --alias:react-devtools-core=./cli/shims/react-devtools-core.ts --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.postinstall: chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true; { test -d .git && git config core.hooksPath .githooks; } 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.release: npm version prerelease --preid=beta --no-git-tag-version && npm run build:cli && npm publish
scripts.stop:daemon: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/ai.openteam.daemon 2>/dev/null; { test -f ~/.openteam/daemon.pid && kill $(cat ~/.openteam/daemon.pid); } 2>/dev/null; { test -f ~/.openteam/daemon.dev.pid && kill $(cat ~/.openteam/daemon.dev.pid); } 2>/dev/null; rm -f ~/.openteam/daemon.port ~/.openteam/daemon.pid ~/.openteam/daemon.dev.port ~/.openteam/daemon.dev.pid; true
